description: The TrackingSmoothingSettings component is better explained on the Settings page.

fields.HandPositionSmoothing: How much to smooth hand positioning, if not null.
fields.HandRotationSmoothing: How much to smooth hand rotation, if not null.
fields.FeetPositionSmoothing: How much to smooth feet positioning, if not null.
fields.FeetRotationSmoothing: How much to smooth feet rotation, if not null.
fields.HipsPositionSmoothing: How much to smooth hips positioning, if not null.
fields.HipsRotationSmoothing: How much to smooth hips rotation, if not null.
